mapper.select:
SELECT grp_cd_oid, grp_cd, grp_cd_nm, grp_cd_expln, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.grp_cd
AND grp_cd = #{grpCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.grp_cd( grp_cd_oid, grp_cd, grp_cd_nm, grp_cd_expln, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{grpCdOid}, #{grpCd}, #{grpCdNm}, #{grpCdExpln}, #{useYn}, #{regId}, now(), #{mdfcnId}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.cd WHERE grp_cd_oid = #{grpCdOid} AND cd_val = #{cdVal}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.cd( cd_oid, grp_cd_oid, cd_val, cd_nm, up_cd_val, cd_expln, cd_seq, use_yn, atrb1, atrb2, atrb3, atrb4, atrb5, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{cdOid}, #{grpCdOid}, #{cdVal}, #{cdNm}, #{upCdVal}, #{cdExpln}, #{cdSeq}, #{useYn}, #{atrb1}, #{atrb2}, #{atrb3}, #{atrb4}, #{atrb5}, #{regId}, now(), #{mdfcnId}, now() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.grp_cd
grp_cd = #{grpCd},
grp_cd_nm = #{grpCdNm},
grp_cd_expln = #{grpCdExpln},
use_yn = #{useYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = now()
WHERE grp_cd_oid = #{grpCdOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.cd
cd_val = #{cdVal},
cd_nm = #{cdNm},
up_cd_val = #{upCdVal},
cd_expln = #{cdExpln},
cd_seq = #{cdSeq},
use_yn = #{useYn},
atrb1 = #{atrb1},
atrb2 = #{atrb2},
atrb3 = #{atrb3},
atrb4 = #{atrb4},
atrb5 = #{atrb5},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = now()
WHERE cd_oid = #{cdOid}
